content.query:
-- DROP VIEW a_SalesData
-- SELECT Brand, Sum([Sales Amt]), sum([Net Sales Amt]) from a_SalesData group by Brand
-- SELECT TOP 10 COUNT(*) FROM v_SalesData
CREATE VIEW a_SalesData AS
SELECT
 [D]     [Division]
,[C]     [Company]
,[CID]   [Customer ID]
,[CN]    [Customer Name]
,[CPO]   [Customer PO]
,[WH]    [Warehouse]
,[OID]  [Order ID]
,[IID]  [Invoice ID]
,[Date]
,[Brand]
,[PC]   [Product Category]
,[PIDA] [Part ID - Actual] 
,[PIGF] [Part ID - Go Forward]
,[DESC] [Part Description]
,[SID]  [Supplier ID]
,[Amt]  [Sales Amt]
,[NetAmt] [Net Sales Amt]
,[Qty]  [Sales Qty]
,[Type] [Sales Type]
, [STN] as [Ship to Name]
, SA1 as [Ship to Address 1]
, SA2 as [Ship to Address 2]
,[STC] [Ship to City]
,[STS] [Ship to State]
,[STZ] [Ship to Zip Code]
, BTN as [Bill to Name]
, BA1 as [Bill to Address 1]
, BA2 as [Bill to Address 2]
,[BTC] [Bill to City]
,[BTS] [Bill to State]
,[BTZ] [Bill to Zip Code]
,[Cost]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/Analytics/a_SalesData.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

/* Pipeline Query 

SELECT 
 [Division]             [D]
,[Company]              [C]
,[Customer ID]          [CID]
,[Customer Name]        [CN]
,[Customer PO]          [CPO]
,[Warehouse]            [WH]
,[Cost]
,[Part ID - Go Forward] [PIDGF]
,[Part Description]     [DESC]
,[Supplier ID]          [SID]
,[Sales Amt]            [Amt]
,[Sales Qty]            [Qty]
,[Sales Type]           [Type]
,[Order ID]             [OID]
,[Invoice ID]           [IID]
,[Date]
,[Brand]
,[Product Category]     [PC]
,[Part ID - Actual]     [PIDA]
 FROM [dbo].[v_SalesData]

*/
